scripts.copy-static: mkdir -p dist/style dist/assets && cp -R src/style/. dist/style/ && cp -R assets/. dist/assets/
scripts.build: npm run clean && TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.webpack.json node -r ts-node/register ./node_modules/webpack/bin/webpack.js --config webpack.config.cts --mode production && npm run copy-static
scripts.watch: npm run copy-static && concurrently -k -n static,webpack "npm run watch:static" "TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.webpack.json node -r ts-node/register ./node_modules/webpack/bin/webpack.js --config webpack.config.cts --mode development --watch"
scripts.win:copy-static: if not exist dist\style mkdir dist\style & if not exist dist\assets mkdir dist\assets & xcopy /E /I /Y src\style dist\style & xcopy /E /I /Y assets dist\assets
scripts.win:build: npm run win:clean && set TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.webpack.json&& node -r ts-node/register .\node_modules\webpack\bin\webpack.js --config webpack.config.cts --mode production && npm run win:copy-static
scripts.win:watch: npm run win:copy-static && npx concurrently -k -n static,webpack "npm run win:watch:static" "set TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.webpack.json&& node -r ts-node/register .\node_modules\webpack\bin\webpack.js --config webpack.config.cts --mode development --watch"
